assessmentSummary.method: Pass = 1, Partial = 0.5, Issue = 0; Not verified excluded.

assessments.note: Public dashboard clearly explains the service purpose.
A first-time visitor can understand the platform value from the dashboard introduction.
The dashboard provides a visible start action: إضافة طلب جديد.
Persistent header/footer navigation and a Home link are visible on public pages.
A site map is available in the public footer.
The phone-number input on SendOTP is visually empty and has no persistent field label or placeholder.
The required-state message is visible, but it is separated below the unlabeled input rather than attached to the field label.
A brief instruction exists, but it does not show phone format/example before entry.
The public phone-number request screen does not visibly provide contextual data-use/privacy information beside the collection action.
The main purpose is stated, but the SendOTP page repeats a large hero before the task form.
English public copy visibly includes inconsistent product capitalization and awkward phrasing.
The oversized hero consumes substantial vertical attention before the phone-number task.
The Arabic and English public views show inconsistent naming/copy quality.
The 404 page provides a Home-page link but no search, task shortcut, or contextual recovery choices.
No automated contrast measurement was run in this pilot.
Keyboard-only operation was not tested in this public-browser pilot.
A real narrow-viewport mobile audit remains pending.
Perceived-performance states require a controlled transaction test.

findings.title: The phone-number field has no persistent visible label or input example
findings.observed: The public OTP page shows an empty phone field. Its context appears as a heading above and a required-message below, rather than as a field label or example tied to the input.
findings.impact: Citizens can hesitate over the expected format or whether the field is the required mobile-number input, creating avoidable friction at the first step of a service request.
findings.recommendation: Add a persistent label such as “رقم الهاتف المحمول”, show a Jordanian format example, and place the required indicator beside the label.

evidence.description: Empty phone input, heading context, and separate required-message visible on the OTP page.

arabic.title: حقل رقم الهاتف لا يحتوي على تسمية مرئية دائمة أو مثال للإدخال
arabic.observed: تعرض صفحة OTP العامة حقلاً فارغاً للهاتف، بينما تظهر سياقاته كعنوان أعلاه ورسالة إلزام أدناه بدلاً من تسمية أو مثال مرتبطين بالحقل.
arabic.impact: قد يتردد المواطنون بشأن الصيغة المتوقعة أو ما إذا كان الحقل هو رقم الهاتف المحمول المطلوب، مما يزيد الاحتكاك في بداية الطلب.
arabic.recommendation: أضف تسمية دائمة مثل رقم الهاتف المحمول، ومثالاً لصيغة رقم أردني، وضع مؤشر الإلزام بجوار التسمية.

findings.title: The mobile-number collection step lacks contextual privacy/data-use reassurance
findings.observed: The screen asks for a working phone number to continue, but no concise explanation of why it is required or how it will be used is visible beside the field or Send action.
findings.impact: Users may hesitate before providing a personal contact detail, especially in a public-government service context.
findings.recommendation: Add one concise line near the field explaining the purpose of the number and link directly to the relevant privacy policy.

evidence.description: Phone number request and Send action shown without adjacent data-use explanation.

arabic.title: خطوة جمع رقم الهاتف المحمول تفتقر إلى طمأنة سياقية حول الخصوصية واستخدام البيانات
arabic.observed: تطلب الشاشة رقماً هاتفياً صالحاً للمتابعة دون تفسير موجز ظاهر لسبب طلبه أو كيفية استخدامه بجوار الحقل أو زر الإرسال.
arabic.impact: قد يتردد المستخدمون قبل تقديم بيانات اتصال شخصية، خصوصاً في سياق خدمة حكومية عامة.
arabic.recommendation: أضف سطراً موجزاً قرب الحقل يشرح الغرض من الرقم، مع رابط مباشر لسياسة الخصوصية ذات الصلة.

findings.title: English product naming and task copy are inconsistent
findings.observed: The English view visibly uses “bekhedmtcom PlatForm” and “Phone Number Or Register Via Sanad”, with inconsistent capitalization and awkward construction.
findings.impact: Inconsistent public-language quality weakens confidence and makes a government service feel less polished to English-speaking users.
findings.recommendation: Apply an approved English terminology and capitalization glossary, then QA every public heading, button, breadcrumb, and help message.

evidence.capture: Public browser inspection after language switch, 2026-07-14
evidence.description: English heading and phone/Sanad prompt visible in the public form.
evidence.evidencePendingReason: The available capture is Arabic and does not substantiate the English-language copy observation; no matching English screenshot was captured.

findings.exclusionReason: The available capture is Arabic and does not substantiate the English-language copy observation; no matching English screenshot was captured.

findings.title: A large repeated hero delays the start of the phone-verification task
findings.observed: The OTP page retains a large branded hero and duplicate platform heading above the single-field request form.
findings.impact: The first task step is visually pushed down and competes with decorative context, adding unnecessary scroll and attention cost.
findings.recommendation: Use a compact task header for authentication/request-start pages and bring the form, help, and privacy context into the first focused viewport.

evidence.description: Large hero remains above the OTP card and repeats the platform context.

arabic.title: لافتة كبيرة متكررة تؤخر بدء مهمة التحقق من الهاتف
arabic.observed: تحتفظ صفحة OTP بلافتة كبيرة ذات علامة تجارية وعنوان منصة مكرر فوق نموذج الطلب ذي الحقل الواحد.
arabic.impact: تُدفع أول خطوة للمهمة إلى أسفل بصرياً وتنافسها معلومات زخرفية، مما يزيد تكلفة الانتباه والتمرير.
arabic.recommendation: استخدم رأس مهمة مضغوطاً لصفحات بدء الطلب أو المصادقة، واجعل النموذج والمساعدة وسياق الخصوصية ضمن أول شاشة مركزة.

findings.title: The 404 recovery path offers only a generic Home-page route
findings.observed: The public 404 page presents a “Home page” button but no search, frequently used service route, or contextual recovery suggestion.
findings.impact: A user arriving through a broken or expired deep link must restart navigation without help finding the intended service or information.
findings.recommendation: Keep Home, then add Search, “Start a new request”, top tasks, and a short message that explains how to recover the intended destination.

evidence.description: 404 page displays generic explanation and a single Home page action.

arabic.title: مسار التعافي من صفحة 404 يقدم طريقاً عاماً للصفحة الرئيسية فقط
arabic.observed: تعرض صفحة 404 العامة زر الصفحة الرئيسية دون بحث أو مسار للخدمات المستخدمة كثيراً أو اقتراح تعافٍ سياقي.
arabic.impact: يضطر المستخدم الذي يصل عبر رابط عميق معطل أو منتهٍ إلى إعادة بدء التنقل دون مساعدة في العثور على الخدمة أو المعلومة المقصودة.
arabic.recommendation: أبقِ الصفحة الرئيسية ثم أضف البحث وبدء طلب جديد وأهم المهام ورسالة قصيرة تشرح كيفية استعادة الوجهة المقصودة.

findings.title: The satisfaction metric does not show its unit, scale, or response base
findings.observed: The dashboard shows “62” for satisfaction while neighbouring dashboard measures use percentages; no scale or number of evaluations is visible in the metric card.
findings.impact: A public reader cannot confidently interpret whether 62 is a percentage, a score, or a count, reducing transparency of the dashboard.
findings.recommendation: Label the satisfaction measure explicitly—for example “62% satisfaction (n=…)” or “3.1/5 average rating (n=…)”—and expose the response base.

evidence.description: Dashboard metric card shows 62 with satisfaction label while adjacent cards use percent signs.
evidence.evidencePendingReason: The raw dashboard capture displays a 404 page and does not substantiate the satisfaction-metric observation.

findings.exclusionReason: The raw dashboard capture displays a 404 page and does not substantiate the satisfaction-metric observation.
